myron-shneider.seeking: Co-founders, being around other people building
myron-shneider.bg: Northeastern University, B.S. New Venture Management. Brand Partnerships at Doing Things Media (Mar 2022–Mar 2023) — McDonald's, iRobot, Duolingo, part of the 'Corn Kid' viral moment (100M+ impressions). Social Strategy at Flock Freight. Also builds Parsha Map and Diaspora Map (Jewish-community consumer products).
